reviews.comment:
Accesible desde la ruta 2,  baños super limpios. Parador al aire libre, con mesas,para descansar un rato, tomar mate o pasear a las  mascotas. Un buena parada de regreso a Buenos Aires.

(Translated by Google)
Accessible from Route 2, with super clean restrooms. An open-air rest area with tables, perfect for relaxing, enjoying mate, or walking your pets. A great stop on the way back to Buenos Aires.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwLWJmMHhRRRAB
